summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Alberto Filgueiras website iteration 2. All 16 requested features verified. Key changes: WhatsApp messages standardized, carousel reduced to 4 images with correct Brazil volleyball caption, About page updated with PhD FHEA title and Licença C entry, Transculturais terminology, real institution logos, navigation renamed to Serviços with new Fortaleza Emocional tab, new /programa-fortaleza-emocional page with 16 modules.
critical_code_review_comments: All data is MOCKED in /app/frontend/src/mock.js - no real backend implementation
Contact form submission shows toast but doesn't actually send data anywhere
Login form is non-functional (just shows toast, no actual authentication)
/consultoria route shows blank page (header/footer only) - consider adding 404 page or redirect to /servicos
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is iteration 2 of frontend-only prototype. All data is mocked. Backend is not implemented. Key changes verified: 1) All WhatsApp links have standardized message 'Olá, gostaria de mais informações de como marcar o meu primeiro atendimento.' 2) Home carousel has 4 images (vertical photo removed) 3) Brazil photo caption says 'Seleção Brasileira de Voleibol de Praia' 4) About title shows 'Alberto Filgueiras, PhD FHEA' 5) Education has 'Licença C de Treinador de Futebol' entry 6) Institution logos are real images from customer-assets.emergentagent.com 7) About page has 'Transculturais' not 'Cross-Culturais' 8) Navigation shows 'Serviços' not 'Consultoria' 9) Navigation shows 'Fortaleza Emocional' tab 10) /servicos route works 11) /programa-fortaleza-emocional route works with 16 session modules 12) Fortaleza Emocional has young soccer images from Unsplash 13) Fortaleza Emocional WhatsApp CTA has different message about Programa 14) Footer has Serviços and Fortaleza Emocional links 15) Contact page WhatsApp has standardized message 16) Old /consultoria route shows blank page (no content, just layout)

routing.consultoria_route_no_longer_exists: PASSED (shows blank page with layout only)
